zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke於1226年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特時，他的父親Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche43歲，母親Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England40歲。他於1247年8月13日與Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1250年登記服兵役。他去世於1296年5月18日在英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke于1226年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特时，他的父亲Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche43岁，母亲Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England40岁。他于1247年8月13日与Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1250年登记服兵役。他去世于1296年5月18日在英国英格兰肯特布拉布恩享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vallance
meanings: English and Scottish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Valence in Drôme, France, named with Latin valentia ‘strength, capacity’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke was born in 1226, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, was 43 and his mother, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, was 40. He married Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke on 13 August 1247, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1250. He died on 18 May 1296, in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke est né en 1226, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke le 13 août 1247, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1250. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1296, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke 1226 in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche 43 und seine Mutter Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England 40. Er hat am 13. August 1247 in England Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1250 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 18. Mai 1296 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke è nato il nel 1226 nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke il 13 agosto 1247, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1250. Morì il 18 maggio 1296, nel Brabourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembrokeが1226年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントで生まれた時，父Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marcheは43歳，母Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandは40歳であった。1247年8月13日にイギリスでJoan Munchensy Countess of Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年に兵役登録をした。彼は1296年5月18日にイギリスイギリスケントブラボウルンで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke(이)가 1226년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1247년 8월 13일 영국에서 Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1296년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브라보우른에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke nasceu em 1226, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke em 13 de agosto de 1247, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1250. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1296, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke родился в 1226 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke 13 августа 1247 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1250 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 18 мая 1296 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
